title: sticherus urceolatus
intro: Sticherus urceolatus, also known as the Urceolate Rattan Palm, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marattiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sticherus urceolatus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Sticherus urceolatus can be made by infusing the plant in hot water or using it in a decoction to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
